title: Radiant Scumble
description: Ce style imite la gouache opaque et l'acrylique traditionnelles avec des coups de pinceau épais et carrés, sans contours tracés. Il repose sur d'intenses contrastes de couleurs chaudes et froides, où des points focaux magiques et lumineux éclairent des formes douces et arrondies sur des fonds atmosphériques brumeux. La texture présente un léger grain numérique et des bords éraflés, évoquant l'ambiance chaleureuse et enchanteresse du développement visuel de l'animation moderne.
description_en: This style mimics traditional opaque gouache and acrylic painting with thick, blocky brushstrokes and a lineless, painterly approach. It relies on intense warm-and-cool color contrasts, where glowing, magical focal points illuminate soft, rounded forms against atmospheric, hazy backgrounds. The texture features subtle digital noise and scumbled edges, evoking the cozy, enchanting feel of modern animation visual development art.
description_fr: Ce style imite la gouache opaque et l'acrylique traditionnelles avec des coups de pinceau épais et carrés, sans contours tracés. Il repose sur d'intenses contrastes de couleurs chaudes et froides, où des points focaux magiques et lumineux éclairent des formes douces et arrondies sur des fonds atmosphériques brumeux. La texture présente un léger grain numérique et des bords éraflés, évoquant l'ambiance chaleureuse et enchanteresse du développement visuel de l'animation moderne.
prompt: A masterful digital painting of {{subject}}, executed in a style that mimics thick, opaque gouache and matte acrylic traditional media. The rendering technique relies entirely on visible, blocky, and scumbled brushstrokes, completely eschewing any line work or hard drawn contours. Forms and volumes of the {{subject}} are built through distinct, painterly color blocking and overlapping dabs of paint, creating soft, ragged, and organic edges. The color science is driven by a dramatic and enchanting warm-and-cool contrast. A strong, magical, and luminous focal light source emanates from or deeply illuminates the {{subject}}, casting an intense, glowing {{accent_color}} radiance that mimics subsurface scattering on soft materials. This radiant warmth sharply contrasts with the deep, atmospheric {{primary_color}} shadows and soft {{secondary_color}} midtones that envelop the surrounding space. The lighting anatomy features a glowing core with soft, heavily diffused falloff, creating a cozy, ethereal atmosphere. The background utilizes heavy atmospheric perspective, fading into hazy, simplified shapes constructed with broad, flat brush marks. A tactile, matte materiality is present throughout, enhanced by a subtle, uniform digital noise or fine canvas grain that unifies the composition and grounds the digital piece in traditional illustration aesthetics. The staging is reminiscent of high-end visual development art for modern 3D animated fairy tales, emphasizing a serene, nostalgic, and enchanting emotional register. The composition must stretch entirely across the canvas, full bleed to all four corners, with absolutely no borders, no frames, no white margins, and no canvas edges visible, ensuring the environment fully envelopes the viewer.
prompt_removebg: A masterful digital painting of {{subject}}, executed in a style that mimics thick, opaque gouache and matte acrylic traditional media, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The rendering technique relies entirely on visible, blocky, and scumbled brushstrokes, completely eschewing any line work or hard drawn contours. Forms and volumes of the {{subject}} are built through distinct, painterly color blocking and overlapping dabs of paint, creating soft, ragged, and organic edges that interact beautifully with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The color science is driven by a dramatic and enchanting warm-and-cool contrast. A strong, magical, and luminous focal light source emanates from or deeply illuminates the {{subject}}, casting an intense, glowing {{accent_color}} radiance that mimics subsurface scattering on soft materials. This radiant warmth sharply contrasts with the deep, atmospheric {{primary_color}} shadows and soft {{secondary_color}} midtones of the unlit areas. The lighting anatomy features a glowing core with soft, heavily diffused falloff, creating a cozy, ethereal atmosphere. The subject's edges are intentionally allowed to overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame, cropped by the image boundaries, anchoring it dynamically against the {{background_color}}. A tactile, matte materiality is present throughout the painted elements, enhanced by a subtle, uniform digital noise or fine canvas grain that unifies the composition and grounds the digital piece in traditional illustration aesthetics. The staging is reminiscent of high-end visual development art for modern animated fairy tales, emphasizing a serene, nostalgic, and enchanting emotional register.
background_prompt: A serene, atmospheric environment painted in a thick, opaque digital gouache style. The scene features softly rounded, hazy landscape elements and simplified, organic shapes built with blocky, scumbled brushstrokes. A glowing, magical light casts a warm {{accent_color}} radiance across the midground, contrasting beautifully with the deep {{primary_color}} shadows and misty {{secondary_color}} atmospheric perspective in the distance. Subtle digital grain unifies the lineless, painterly composition.
background_prompt_removebg: A serene, atmospheric environment painted in a thick, opaque digital gouache style. The scene features softly rounded, hazy landscape elements and simplified, organic shapes built with blocky, scumbled brushstrokes. A glowing, magical light casts a warm {{accent_color}} radiance across the midground, contrasting beautifully with the deep {{primary_color}} shadows and misty {{secondary_color}} atmospheric perspective in the distance. Subtle digital grain unifies the lineless, painterly composition. In the foreground, a decorative framing element made of softly painted, stylized organic silhouettes acts as a deep shadow vignette, creating profound depth. The entire painterly scene and its framing elements transition smoothly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, leaving empty space in the center for an invisible subject.
